stemHtml: Which of the following statements most accurately describes a great circle route on a Lambert conformal conic chart? A straight line will approximate to a great circle course if the…

options.a: sine of the parallel of origin is equal to the convergence factor.
options.b: great circle course is a curve concave to the parallel of origin.
options.c: straight line follows the parallel of origin.
options.d: straight line is close to the parallel of origin.
